trials.artifactText:
Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Limit requests to 100 per minute per client IP using an in-memory
sliding window keyed by remote address. Requests over the limit get a
429 response with a retry-after header. Document the behavior in the
README.

Also fix paginate() to return a full page: slice() ended at
start + PAGE_SIZE - 1, so each page was short by one item.
